'''Gastess' Finance, Inc.''' was a holding company operating in the [[Parmic sector/Legends|Parmic sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial era]]. It was run by a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] named [[Sarlim Gastess]], who lacked the usual Gotal ability to sense emotions with his head cones (making him a ruthless psychopath by Gotal standards).<ref name="Galaxy Guide 9">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''</ref>

Gastess' Finance operated by executing hostile takeovers of smaller companies, firing the existing management, and running them into the ground for a quick infusion of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. Gastess would send executives from his company to strip his new acquisition's assets. His chief lieutenants were [[Halleb Harmion|Halleb]], [[K'yne Harmion|K'yne]], and [[Sarell Harmion]], three brothers who shared their boss's enjoyment of raiding and destroying successful corporations.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 9" />

After Gastess' Finance had squeezed all possible short-term profits from it, the company would be disposed of. If no buyer could be found, it was simply disbanded, and its assets liquidated. Eventually, even planetary-sized corporations were targeted by Gastess' Finance. After Gastess was finished with a planetary corporation, the inhabitants of the planet it once dominated were unemployed and usually heavy in debt. This left them open to exploitation or even [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] by the Empire, which was probably the reason the Empire quietly approved of Gastess' operations.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 9" />

While their business originated in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], they expanded to more central locations. They were called in by [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR]] to consult on the financial "reconstruction" of [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]].<ref name="The Far Orbit Project">''[[The Far Orbit Project]]''</ref>

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] considered Gastess' Finance to be instrumental in the supply of slave labor to the Empire. Thus, [[Starship/Legends|starships]] and other assets of Gastess' Finance were listed as targets by Rebel [[Privateer/Legends|privateers]].<ref name="Pirates & Privateers">''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''</ref>
